hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '\.go$' && cat <<'EOF' || true
[chasago skills reminder] File Go terdeteksi. Sebelum edit, pastikan sudah konsultasi SKILL.md relevan di .claude/skills/:
- Baseline: golang, golang-code-style, golang-naming
- Error/nil/numeric: golang-safety, golang-troubleshooting
- Concurrency/ctx: golang-concurrency, golang-context
- DB: golang-database | CLI: golang-cli | Obs: golang-observability
- Perf: golang-performance, golang-benchmark | Security: golang-security
- Arsitektur: golang-design-patterns, senior-backend
- Modernize/Dok: golang-modernize, golang-documentation
Post-edit: fieldalignment --fix ./... && modernize --fix ./... && go mod tidy && gofmt -w . && golangci-lint run
EOF
